nodes.label: AI as junior writer/editor requiring iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I use it as a junior writer/editor

nodes.label: AI adherence to user-provided rules and style
nodes.label_negative: AI deviation from user rules and style
nodes.grounding_span: the AI is not following my rules

nodes.label: AI accuracy and truthfulness in content generation
nodes.grounding_span: it made up a whole internal method for a business

nodes.label: AI temporal relevance in research
nodes.grounding_span: I'll end up receiving articles or information from articles from 2022, 2023

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming partner for creative ideas
nodes.grounding_span: brainstorm ideas of things to do with students

nodes.label: AI conversation length limitation
nodes.grounding_span: suddenly the conversation is too long, which seems especially unfair

nodes.label: Professional quality and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the collaboration between AI and me usually creates a better final article

nodes.label: Time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I could have done it myself in 1/10th the time

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and pedagogical support
nodes.grounding_span: brainstorm ideas of things to do with students

nodes.label: Satisfaction with collaborative editing role
nodes.grounding_span: I'm normally more satisfied now that I have worked with AI so much

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's failure to follow rules
nodes.grounding_span: it constantly went back to using them. That's been super frustrating

nodes.label: Frustration with AI fabrications
nodes.grounding_span: it made up a whole internal method for a business

nodes.label: Frustration with outdated research results
nodes.grounding_span: I would sometimes lose 2-3 hours of work before I realized it was irrelevant

nodes.label: Acceptance of AI limitations in creative writing
nodes.grounding_span: unless I'm doing creative writing, which AI totally sucks at, I'm happy to not do the actual writing

nodes.label: Iterative rule-based refinement — develops explicit rules from repeated failures
nodes.grounding_span: Most of these I already state in my list of rules (which came about because of recognizing issues while working with AI)

nodes.label: Strategic tool switching — uses different AIs for different strengths
nodes.grounding_span: I use two different AIs ... Each has certain strengths and weaknesses and I work to the strengths of each
